summary: Hey David, what a week! You're down 3.9 pounds over the past two weeks and maintaining a solid 1.95 lbs per week loss rate—that's exactly the kind of sustainable progress that sticks. You've now shed 59 pounds total from your starting point, which is a massive milestone and real proof that your Mounjaro and tracking routine are working together. I noticed you logged 11 days this period, so let's aim to capture those last few days next week—complete logging helps you spot patterns and keeps momentum going. You're doing the hard work consistently, and your body is responding. Keep going.
